name: openchrome
desc: Open-source browser automation MCP server. Control your real Chrome from any AI agent.

name: reflexio
desc: Make your agents improve themselves. Reflexio is an AI agent self-improvement harness that enables your AI agents to continuously learn from real user interactions.

desc: The self-improving all channels AI agent. Self-healing. Fully autonomous. Single Rust binary.

name: mcp-gateway-registry
desc: Enterprise-ready MCP Gateway & Registry that centralizes AI development tools with secure OAuth authentication, dynamic tool discovery, and unified access for both autonomous AI agents and AI coding assistants. Transform scattered MCP server chaos into governed, auditable tool access with Keycloak/Entra integration.

name: gascity
desc: Orchestration-builder SDK for multi-agent coding workflows

name: Zoo-Code
desc: Zoo Code gives you a whole dev team of AI agents in your code editor.

name: Equibles
desc: An open-source, self-hosted mini Bloomberg Terminal for AI agents — SEC filings, institutional holdings, insider trading, congressional trades, and short data from a single self-hosted stack.
